statement: Removing or exposing read paths for write-only fields/tables (e.g., `assistant_reasoning`, `rubric_critics`, `score_critics`) will reduce schema bloat and clarify data contracts.
rationale: These fields/tables are written but have no read APIs in Convex code beyond counts.
keyAssumptions: No external consumers rely on these fields
validationCriteria: DB schema migration plan is safe
No production dashboards rely on these tables
critiquePoints: Future analytics may need these fields
questions: Do you want to keep these for future analytics or remove now?
